Kitchens

Kitchens planned around layout logic, storage and finish control.

Kitchens sit inside the wider full bathroom renovations, kitchen installation and refurbishment, large-format tiling, carpentry, wall systems and flooring installation studio scope, with layout planning, service coordination, fitting and finishing kept in one joined-up sequence.

Manchester North West - Lancashire Plan | Design | Craft

Studio Scope

Kitchen work that feels designed, not assembled.

The kitchen line is delivered as one service inside that joined-up studio offer, so cabinetry, lighting, worktops, carpentry touchpoints and final finishing are resolved together.

  • Layout-led planning for islands, appliances and circulation.
  • Cabinet, worktop and trim alignment checked as one system.
  • Integrated carpentry and service coordination for a clean final read.
  • A finish brief that prioritises lasting tone and texture.

Studio Method

How the studio keeps this scope premium.

01

Planning clarity

Appliance, lighting and work-zone decisions are resolved before fit-out starts.

02

Joinery precision

Cabinet lines, stone edges and reveals are treated as the core visual language.

03

Daily performance

Practical use is designed in without diluting the premium feel.

Selected Project

Altrincham kitchen overhaul

A full kitchen reset centred on darker surfaces, warm lighting and tight cabinetry alignment for a quieter luxury read.

2-4 week programme Custom joinery and lighting Stone worktop coordination

Finish Language

Material references for this service line.

FAQ

Questions homeowners ask before the brief is shaped.

Do you work on complete kitchen transformations?

Yes. We take on full layout, fit-out and finish scopes where design and installation need to stay tightly coordinated.

Can kitchens be paired with other rooms?

Yes. Kitchen-led projects often extend into utility, dining or wider interior works when continuity matters.

What budget range is typical?

Premium kitchen briefs are commonly in the GBP 12,000 to GBP 30,000+ range depending on cabinetry, surfaces and service complexity.

Studio Contact

Discuss kitchens directly with the studio.

Kitchen enquiries move through the same direct studio contact route, so layout decisions and finish expectations are discussed without noise.

Private Consultation

Start your kitchen brief with a private consultation.

Tell us the rooms involved, the finish ambition and the timing you are aiming for. The studio replies with a measured next step rather than a generic sales response.
